name: Moonpetal
lore: A pale flower that blooms only under a full moon. Faintly luminescent.

name: Sleeper's Cap
lore: A red-spotted mushroom found in mossy hollows. Smells faintly of rain.

name: Hearthroot
lore: A gnarled root that radiates a soft warmth even when raw.

name: Skylark Feather
lore: Lighter than air. Said to lift the spirit when ground into powder.

name: Eye of Newt
lore: Don't ask where these come from. Tradition demands their inclusion.

name: Wild Sage
lore: Pungent and grounding. Burned at thresholds; brewed for clear thought.
